title: trichocentrum stramineum
intro: Trichocentrum stramineum, also known as the Stramineum Cattleya or the Stramineum Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The Stramineum orchid is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
